scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.postinstall: npm run install:all && npm run build:prisma
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('public', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.cpSync('frontend/dist', 'public', {recursive:true});"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
